$comment: Config for schema-gen/generate.mjs. 'services' lists the Swagger specs to read (paths relative to repo root). 'excludeSchemas' are REST-plumbing shapes that must not become GraphQL types. 'directives' injects Grafbase composite-schema directives onto generated types/fields (key: 'Type' or 'Type.field') so the generated layer stays regenerable while still carrying federation metadata. 'enumsAsStrings' downgrades all enums to String if the gateway ever rejects enum coercion.
